title: Zoro’s Promise Is Revealed
description: On pages 6–9, this part pushes the Shells Town conflict forward as Luffy challenges the fear surrounding Morgan’s Marines.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TREASURES, huh? Too bad they took 'em...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll get your swords from the idiot son!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THEN, IF YOU WANT YOUR SWORDS BACK...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU'LL HAVE TO JOIN MY CREW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: father!! Why aren't you hunting the brigand who hit me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even you never laid a hand on my lovely- yet- masculine face before!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Do you know why I've never hit you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's because you're an idiot son who's not even worth hitting!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why Should I Fight Your Battles?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU'RE BIG ENOUGH TO WIFE YOUR OWN BOTTOM...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: DON'T MIND IF YOU USE MY STATUS...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: BUT I ONLY LAY HANDS ON PEOPLE WHO DEFY ME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU ARE NOT THE GREAT ONE! I AM GREAT!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I HEARD A LITTLE MOUSE SNUCK INTO MY PARADE GROUND.

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
